member.name: P:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.dist.CachedPageBase.ServiceProvider
member.summary:
Get the service provider only once - ideally in Dnn9.4 we will get it from Dnn If we would get it multiple times, there are edge cases where it could be different each time! #2614
📖 ServiceProvider

member.name: M:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.dist.CachedPageBase.GetSiteRoot(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: portalId and pageId context is lost on DesktopModules/ToSic.Sxc/dist/...aspx and DNN Framework can not resolve site root, so we need to handle it by ourselves

member.name: T:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.StartUp.StartupDnn
member.summary:
This configures .net Core Dependency Injection The StartUp is defined as an IServiceRouteMapper. This way DNN will auto-run this code before anything else
📖 StartupDnn

member.name: M:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.StartUp.StartupDnn.RegisterRoutes(DotNetNuke.Web.Api.IMapRoute)
member.summary: This will be called by DNN when loading the assemblies. We just want to trigger the DI-Configure

member.name: M:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.StartUp.StartupDnn.Configure
member.summary: Configure IoC for 2sxc. If it's already configured, do nothing.

member.name: M:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.StartUp.StartupDnn.SetupOldStaticFeaturesForCompatibility(ToSic.Sys.Capabilities.Features.ISysFeaturesService)
member.summary: After the SysLoader got the features, we must attach it to an old API which had was public This was used in Mobius etc. to see if features are activated

member.name: T:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.StartUp.StartupDnn9
member.summary:
This is the preferred way to start Dependency Injection, but it requires Dnn 9.4+ If an older version of Dnn is used, this code will not run
📖 StartupDnn9

member.name: P:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.ServiceProvider
member.summary:
Get the service provider only once - ideally in Dnn9.4 we will get it from Dnn If we would get it multiple times, there are edge cases where it could be different each time! #2614
📖 ServiceProvider

member.name: P:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.Block
member.summary:
Block needs to self-initialize when first requested, because it's used in the Actions-Menu builder which runs before page-load
📖 Block

member.name: P:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.RequestLogging
member.summary:
Get the request logging helper for this request.
📖 RequestLogging
member.remarks: - Must use ServiceProvider.Build directly, as the `GetService` method would try to use the Log before it's created. - delay creating until first use to really just track our time when needed.

member.name: P:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.LogTimer
member.summary:
Log Timer to use everywhere we want to track the cumulative time.
📖 LogTimer
member.remarks: Time must be false, as it will be started/stopped as needed within the DoInTimer methods.

member.name: M:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.Page_PreRender(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Process View if a Template has been set

member.name: F:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.phOutput
member.remarks: Auto-generated field. To modify move field declaration from designer file to code-behind file.

member.name: M:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.TryCatchAndLogToDnn``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Run some code in a try/catch, and output it nicely if an error is thrown

member.name: M:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.HtmlLog
member.summary: Html Comment containing the log for the current module

member.name: P:ToSic.Sxc.Dnn.View.ModuleActions
member.summary:
Dnn will create the menu with all actions like edit entity, app settings, etc.
📖 ModuleActions

member.name: T:ToSic.Sxc.Sys.SxcSharedAssemblyInfo
member.summary:
Contains information for all assemblies to use
📖 SxcSharedAssemblyInfo
